heading: Regulations
label: 3525 Regulations
text: The Office of Personnel Management may prescribe regulations to carry out this subchapter.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 3551, , , ; , , , related to restoration of positions of Federal and District of Columbia employees upon release from duty in Reserves or National Guard, prior to repeal by , §§ 2(b)(2)(B), 8, , , 3175, effective with respect to reemployments initiated on or after first day after 60-day period beginning , with transition rules.Pub.
